operation.name: InsertIgnore
operation.sql: INSERT IGNORE INTO user_pts_state (user_id, pts, pts_updated_at, partition_id, owner_epoch, row_version, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (:user_id, :pts, :pts_updated_at, :partition_id, :owner_epoch, :row_version, NOW(6), NOW(6))

operation.name: SelectByUserId
operation.sql: SELECT user_id, pts, pts_updated_at, partition_id, owner_epoch, row_version, created_at, updated_at FROM user_pts_state WHERE user_id = :user_id LIMIT 1

operation.name: SelectForUpdate
operation.sql: SELECT user_id, pts, pts_updated_at, partition_id, owner_epoch, row_version, created_at, updated_at FROM user_pts_state WHERE user_id = :user_id LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE

operation.name: UpdatePts
operation.sql: UPDATE user_pts_state SET pts = :pts, pts_updated_at = :pts_updated_at, partition_id = :partition_id, owner_epoch = :owner_epoch, row_version = row_version + 1, updated_at = NOW(6) WHERE user_id = :user_id
